channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: jwasham /coding-interview-university | N/A | N/A
item.description: A complete computer science study plan to become a software engineer.

item.title: OpenBMB /ChatDev | Python | N/A
item.description: ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration

item.title: vas3k /TaxHacker | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories

item.title: neovim /neovim | Vim Script | N/A
item.description: Vim-fork focused on extensibility and usability

item.title: sherlock-project /sherlock | Python | N/A
item.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

item.title: PaddlePaddle /PaddleOCR | Python | N/A
item.description: Turn any PDF or image document into structured data for your AI. A powerful, lightweight OCR toolkit that bridges the gap between images/PDFs and LLMs. Supports 100+ languages.

item.title: microsoft /agent-lightning | Python | N/A
item.description: The absolute trainer to light up AI agents.

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: Yeachan-Heo /oh-my-claudecode | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Teams-first Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code

item.title: luongnv89 /claude-howto | Python | N/A
item.description: A visual, example-driven guide to Claude Code — from basic concepts to advanced agents, with copy-paste templates that bring immediate value.
